title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Nimbus Post - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Nimbus Post - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nimbus Post. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About Nimbus Post:
Nimbus Post is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nimbus Post!
